message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "BileMo API" as BMAPI #LightBlue2
database "BileMo Database" as BMDB #LightCyan3

User ->> BMAPI : 1 Authentication Request (email, plain password)
activate BMAPI
note right of BMAPI 
end note
deactivate BMAPI
alt [invalid credentials]
    activate BMAPI
        BMAPI <- -BMDB : 3 null
            deactivate BMDB
                BMAPI -->> User :4 JSON Authentication response: 401 Invalid credentials
                    else[valid credentials]
                        BMAPI <--- BMDB :5 User object
                            deactivate BMDB
                                BMAPI --> User :6 JSON Authentication Response: 200 JWT token
                                    end alt
                                        User->>+BMAPI :7 Show products list(JWT Token )
                                            loop Check route & query parameters are valid
                                                if Route does not exist then
                                                    return 9 404 Route Not Found
                                                        elseif Security firewall check token is valid& user permissions
                                                            access denied
                                                                return 11 403 Forbidden
                                                                    elseif Access Denied
                                                                        return 12 401 Unauthorized
                                                                            endif Get Products results
                                                                                Results Query Responses(Products Object)
                                                                                    Serialize(normalize+encode)results objects to Json
                                                                                        Return 200 Serialized json result
                                                                                            End Loop


@enduml
